scenarios.description: String-overload: non-null fragment, non-null context, non-null baseUri returns parsed nodes
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub returns a single TextNode
scenarios.expectedResult: list with one TextNode with text 'hello'
pseudocode: TreeBuilder stub that returns List.of(new TextNode("hello"));

scenarios.description: String-overload: null context is forwarded to TreeBuilder.parseFragment
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub asserts context is null and returns empty list
pseudocode: TreeBuilder stub that asserts context==null and returns Collections.emptyList();

scenarios.description: String-overload: null baseUri is forwarded to TreeBuilder.parseFragment
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub records baseUri and returns empty list
scenarios.expectedResult: empty list returned and stub.lastBaseUri is null
pseudocode: class RecBuilder extends TreeBuilder { String last; @Override List<Node> parseFragment(...) { last = baseUri; return Collections.emptyList(); } ... }

scenarios.description: String-overload: TreeBuilder.parseFragment throws IOException, propagates UncheckedIOException
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub reads reader and throws UncheckedIOException
scenarios.expectedResult: UncheckedIOException is thrown with cause IOException
pseudocode: TreeBuilder ioStub that on parseFragment(reader,...) does reader.read() then wraps IOException in UncheckedIOException;
throws UncheckedIOException with cause instanceof IOException;

scenarios.description: Reader-overload: non-null Reader, non-null context, non-null baseUri returns parsed nodes
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub returns a Comment node
pseudocode: TreeBuilder stub that returns List.of(new Comment("cmt"));

scenarios.description: Reader-overload: null context is forwarded to TreeBuilder.parseFragment
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub asserts context is null and returns empty list
pseudocode: TreeBuilder stub that asserts context==null and returns Collections.emptyList();

scenarios.description: Reader-overload: null baseUri is forwarded to TreeBuilder.parseFragment
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub records baseUri and returns empty list
scenarios.expectedResult: empty list returned and stub.lastBaseUri is null
pseudocode: class RecBuilder extends TreeBuilder { String last; @Override List<Node> parseFragment(...) { last = baseUri; return Collections.emptyList(); } ... }

scenarios.description: Reader-overload: TreeBuilder.parseFragment throws IOException, propagates UncheckedIOException
scenarios.precondition: TreeBuilder stub reads reader and throws UncheckedIOException
scenarios.expectedResult: UncheckedIOException is thrown with cause IOException
pseudocode: TreeBuilder ioStub that on parseFragment(reader,...) does reader.read() then wraps IOException in UncheckedIOException;
throws UncheckedIOException with cause instanceof IOException;
